source: ## Backend Notify (Request Body / Request Header / retry policy)

parameters.name: rec_trade_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this transaction generated by our server.

parameters.name: auth_code
parameters.description: Authorization code. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

parameters.name: bank_transaction_id
parameters.description: Transaction identifier for the bank.

parameters.name: bank_order_number
parameters.description: Acquirer's returned order number after authorization.

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: A self-defined identifier for each transaction. Doesn't allow null.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Transaction price.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Response code. 0 indicates success.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Error message.

parameters.name: transaction_time_millis
parameters.description: Time when the bank handles the transaction.

parameters.name: transaction_complete_millis
parameters.description: Time when transaction completed (support E.SUN, Cathay Bank).

parameters.name: pay_info
parameters.description: E-payment related information object. Only returned for e-payments transactions.

parameters.name: acquirer
parameters.description: Acquiring banks or payment processors.

parameters.name: e_invoice_carrier
parameters.description: Electronic invoice carrier information. Support: JKOPAY, Plus Pay.

parameters.name: card_identifier
parameters.description: Card identifier. Supported only for Direct Pay and Token Pay.

parameters.name: bank_result_code
parameters.description: Response code from the bank.

parameters.name: bank_result_msg
parameters.description: Error message from the bank.

parameters.name: merchant_reference_info
parameters.description: Merchant reference information. Contains affiliate_codes (Array).

parameters.name: instalment_info
parameters.description: When use instalment will return. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: redeem_info
parameters.description: When use redeem and non 3D transaction will return. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: event_code
parameters.description: A code defined by the bank, E-Wallet and merchants. Support: Easy Wallet.

parameters.name: merchandise_details
parameters.description: The item amount or points that are excluded from redeems.

request.description: After an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction is completed, TapPay POSTs a JSON transaction-result notification to the merchant-supplied backend_notify_url (https, port 443).

responses.description: Merchant must respond HTTP 200 to acknowledge receipt. If not HTTP 200, TapPay resends every 1, 2, 4, 8, 16 minutes (up to 5 times); if all fail, a notification email is sent.

missing: Backend Notify response body schema (only HTTP 200 status is stated)
Required/optional designation for individual fields (no asterisk markers in the source table)
Authentication/signature mechanism for verifying the notification (source only suggests re-checking via Record API)
